Class FileManager

java.lang.Object
database.FileManager
public class FileManager extends Object

    loadArtists(String filepath, StreamingDatabase db)
    Loads artists from a text file.

    Loads media content,linking artists and generating genres.

    Loads genre definitions into the system.

    Restores application states from a binary file, resolving and re-linking object reference paths to secure data topology across internal collections.

    Loads users from into the database.

  • Constructor Details

    • FileManager

      public FileManager()

  • Method Details

    • loadUsers

      public static void loadUsers(String filepath, StreamingDatabase db)
      Loads users from into the database. Expected format: ID;Name;Region;RegistrationDate(YYYY-MM-DD)
      Parameters:
      filepath - path to the source text file
      db - the active database instance to populate

    • loadContents

      public static void loadContents(String filepath, StreamingDatabase db)
      Loads media content,linking artists and generating genres. Expected format: ID;Name;Type;Genre;ReleaseDate(YYYY-MM-DD);Duration;ArtistIDs
      Parameters:
      filepath - path to the content data file
      db - the active database instance to populate

    • loadGenres

      public static void loadGenres(String filepath, StreamingDatabase db)
      Loads genre definitions into the system. Expected format: ID;Name
      Parameters:
      filepath - path to the genre data file
      db - the active database instance to populate

    • loadArtists

      public static void loadArtists(String filepath, StreamingDatabase db)
      Loads artists from a text file. Expected format: ID;Name;Nationality;Gender;BirthDate(YYYY-MM-DD)
      Parameters:
      filepath - path to the artist records file
      db - the active database instance to populate

    • saveSystem

      public static void saveSystem(StreamingDatabase db, String filepath)
      Captures a runtime state snapshot by compiling entity collections and writing them into a single serialized binary object stream.
      Parameters:
      db - source database engine containing data states
      filepath - destination path for the binary state file

    • loadSystem

      public static void loadSystem(StreamingDatabase db, String filepath)
      Restores application states from a binary file, resolving and re-linking object reference paths to secure data topology across internal collections.
      Parameters:
      db - target database instance where tables will be restored
      filepath - source binary file containing serialized snapshots

    • saveArchive

      public static void saveArchive(Archive archive, String filepath)
      Saves all archived (deleted) entities to a text file.
      Parameters:
      archive - the archive instance containing deleted entities
      filepath - path to the destination text file

    • saveUsers

      public static void saveUsers(StreamingDatabase db, String filepath)

    • saveArtists

      public static void saveArtists(StreamingDatabase db, String filepath)

    • saveGenres

      public static void saveGenres(StreamingDatabase db, String filepath)

    • saveContents

      public static void saveContents(StreamingDatabase db, String filepath)

    • saveSearchResults

      public static void saveSearchResults(Iterable<String> results, String filepath)
